abi.name: querySwapSingleTokenExactIn
abi._note: eth_call-ONLY (off-chain discovery/prepare samples it via viem). It is NOT called on-chain inside the cook: it is declared `nonpayable` (reverts NotStaticCall() 0x67f84ab2 under a plain CALL — it demands a static context) yet INTERNALLY unlock()s the Vault, a state write (reverts StateChangeDuringStaticCall under a STATICCALL) — both guards fire, so it is unusable as an on-chain minAmountOut source. The recipe executes the off-chain-priced share as a straight exactIn swap with minAmountOut=0 (see ecoswap.sauce.ts). Kept `nonpayable` (its true on-chain mutability) so viem's readContract drives the off-chain sampling.
